hero.badge: rentals in 9 tunisian cities · short & long-term
hero.subhead: Villas by the sea, apartments in the medina, a summer place for the trip home. Nesty is the Tunisian rental platform where every home is verified and tourable in 3D — pay on arrival or online, and book by the night or by the season.
hero.trustLine: Pay on arrival or online · Verified by our team · Tour in 3D first

pillars.lead: Nesty is not a CRM you glue to a website. It's a platform designed as one thing, split across the three places where real estate actually happens.

items.title: A workspace that doesn't feel like a spreadsheet.
items.body: One board for every rental you carry — nightly stays, monthly rentals, yearly leases. Team roles per agent, quick edits from a phone, and a calendar that doesn't need a group chat to stay in sync.

items.title: An app that respects your afternoon.
items.body: Search by neighborhood, filter by what actually matters (metro line, sea distance, pets), tour the home in 3D, then book by the night or hold the dates for a full month — only when it's already close to a yes.

items.title: One truthful calendar, live in both.
items.body: A booking made on mobile lands in the workspace the same second. No double check-ins, no overlapping leases, no 'let me check with the owner and I'll call you back'.

how.lead: From 'we've got a new place' to 'the keys are handed over' — this is the walk. No hidden phases, no accounts we open behind your back.

steps.title: You publish the home. Once.
steps.body: Drop the address on the map, upload eight photos, and tag the essentials — bedrooms, floor, air-con, pet policy, and whether it rents by the night or by the month. The workspace fills the rest from the address (neighborhood, metro line, sea distance). Under 3 minutes per listing, on desktop or phone.

steps.title: We turn photos into a walkthrough.
steps.body: Nesty stitches the same photos into an immersive 3D tour — room by room, in the browser, no headset. You approve it, we push it live. Renters see the truth of the space before they even pack a bag.

steps.title: Renters tour, save, and reserve.
steps.body: In the app they filter by neighborhood, walk through in 3D, save the top three, then either book a short stay (check-in / check-out) or request a long-term lease. Every request lands in your inbox with the person, the dates, and the exact slot they picked.

steps.title: The calendar tells the truth to everyone.
steps.body: You confirm in one tap; the app updates the same second. The team sees the same reality — no double check-ins, no overlapping leases. A monthly export goes to your accountant, unprompted.

product.title1: The workspace your agents open first,
product.title2: and the app your renters keep on the home screen.
product.lead: One dashboard for every rental you manage. One app for every home a renter falls for. A single calendar that keeps nightly stays, monthly rentals and yearly leases in perfect sync.

items.title: Verified before published
items.body: Every address is checked against a real map, every photo is scanned for stock-image reuse, and every owner ID is manually reviewed before a rental ever appears in the app. No phantom flats, no bait pricing.

items.title: Browser-native 3D tours
items.body: Send us eight photos of a room and we return a 360° walkthrough. No cameras to buy, no plugins to install, no app to download for the renter — it opens in a link, on any phone.
items.note: Powered by Tour3D, our in-house engine.

items.title: Nightly & monthly, one calendar
items.body: The workspace, the app and every agent's phone show the same reservation the same second. Short stays and long leases share one calendar — conflicts are impossible by design.

items.title: Requests with SLA timers
items.body: Every visit request, booking or lease inquiry gets a countdown, a suggested reply, and a fallback assignee. If nobody answers in 30 minutes, it re-routes. Your response time stops depending on who happens to be on WhatsApp.

items.title: Roles for the whole team
items.body: Owners see only their rentals. Agents see only their assignments. Managers see everything, plus a weekly digest of what moved. No more shared logins on a sticky note.

items.title: Offline-first mobile
items.body: The app remembers your last search, your saved rentals, and any 3D tour you opened — so a rider on the metro or a beach in Djerba can still browse the shortlist without a bar of signal.
items.note: Because 4G in Sidi Bou isn't magic.

voice.title: Not case studies. Three people who'd let us call them.

items.quote: We used to lose two weekends a month to double-booked keys. Since we moved our short-stay calendar onto Nesty, that number is zero — and the 3D tours cut the tyre-kicker visits by half.
Owners see their villa the way renters see it. That's what unlocked the exclusive-mandate conversations in Sidi Bou.
The visit request lands on the agent's phone with the lease term already filled in. Our reply is a two-tap 'confirm' instead of a phone call.

showcase.title2: on the web and in your pocket.
showcase.lead: Agencies publish once. Renters explore everywhere — a full-screen 3D tour on desktop, the exact same stay a thumb-swipe away on mobile.

cta.body: We open access agency by agency, city by city — no self-serve sign-up. Tell us who you are and how many listings you carry. We'll set up the workspace, migrate your inventory, and shoot the first 3D tours with you.
cta.replyLine: {email} · we reply in one working day

footer.tagline: Every stay verified. Every home tourable in 3D.

items.a: Nesty is a rental platform for Tunisia that connects verified homes and agencies with renters. Agencies publish and manage their inventory in a web workspace; renters browse in the app, tour every home in 3D, and book by the night or sign a monthly lease.

items.q: How do I pay — and is it safe?
items.a: You choose: pay securely online, or pay on arrival — the way most of Tunisia already prefers. Either way your booking is confirmed the moment the agency accepts, and the home is exactly what you toured in 3D.

Before a rental goes live we check the address against a real map, scan every photo for stock-image reuse, and manually review the owner's ID. Most listings are approved within four hours, and none appear in the app until they pass.

items.q: Can I rent monthly instead of nightly?
items.a: Yes. Every home carries both short-term and long-term availability on one calendar, so you can book a few nights or sign a full-year lease from the same listing.

items.q: Which Tunisian cities does Nesty cover?
items.a: Nesty is launching along the coast — Hammamet, Sousse and Djerba first, then Tunis, La Marsa, Sidi Bou Saïd, Gammarth and Carthage as partner agencies onboard.

items.q: How do 3D tours work — do I need an app or a headset?
items.a: No headset, no plugin. Agencies send us eight photos of a room and our Tour3D engine returns a 360° walkthrough that opens in a link on any phone or browser. Renters tour the whole home before ever booking a visit.

items.q: How does an agency get onto Nesty?
items.a: We open access agency by agency. Send us a note and we'll set up your workspace, import your inventory, and turn your existing photos into 3D tours. There's no self-serve sign-up yet — every partner is reviewed first.
Getting onto the workspace and publishing your inventory is free during the launch phase. Reach out for current terms as we open access in your city.

items.q: Do renters need an account to browse?
items.a: Browsing verified homes and 3D tours is open to everyone. You only sign in when you're ready to send a booking or visit request, which routes straight to the managing agency.
